case_number: Constitution Petition is disposed of as not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P No.D-2599 of 2025 Date Order with signature of the Judge Hearing 1. For orders on office objection No. 1 to 3 2. For hearing of main case. 17.07.2025 M/s Mehrunisa and Rimsha Siddiqui Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Zahoor Shah, Additional Prosecutor General *************** After hearing arguments at some length, learned counsel for the Petitioner submitted that she would be satisfied and would not press the instant constitutional petition if the directions are given to learned trial Court to conclude the trial within shortest possible time; this proposal was not opposed by the learned Additional Prosecutor General by contending that previously bail was also granted by this Court in the case of Haji Khan Vs. Province of Sindh. In view of above, the instant Constitution Petition is disposed of as not pressed with directions to the learned trial Court to conclude trial of the case within 90 days. If any witness fails to appear, the trial Court is at liberty to issue process against them. J U D G E J U D G E brohips
